note: Issue #164 211 runtime-only rollout evidence for the a4bded0 runtime subject after PR #182. The live API/worker containers use ai-platform:a4bded0-main-runtime-only-v2 with matching runtime subject, runtime source marker, OCI revision, and hyphen/underscore source-revision labels. Compose still carries the external env-file label caveat. Later runtime-affecting source changes must trigger a fresh rollout/readiness check before any current-source verification claim.
